creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=121754

Oops, sorry, I really need to sleep more. This is really bug in sonata,
not mpd.

Should say:

>Synopsis:	audio/sonata: lyrics fetching broken

>Description:
Lyrics fetching is broken in sonata.

When trying to view the lyrics, sonata says: "ZSI not found, fetching
lyrics support disabled.", but ZSI option in sonata port is enabled and
py25-zsi is installed.

py25-zsi-1.7,1
python25-2.5.2_1
sonata-1.4.2

-- 
Dmitry A. Marakasov    | jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru       | http://www.amdmi3.ru
